authority.approval_gate: User explicitly chose Option B: spec lock plus minimal CouncilCLI executable, governed exhaustively with SDL, agent swarm, deep research, and sibling-agent review.

verification_and_rollback_plan.verification: swift build and swift test pass for Council package (69 tests, 20 suites); new CouncilCLI executable builds and runs; planning docs are consistent and locked; sibling-agent review with exhaustive lenses passes and blockers are addressed.
verification_and_rollback_plan.rollback_plan: Delete branch sdl/council-cli-spec-lock and abandon associated PR; revert README/docs changes manually if merged.

authority.client_orchestrator_mutation_gate: Satisfied by explicit user instruction and authority envelope in this lifecycle record.

retrospective_reviews.summary: Swift correctness and architecture review: three blockers identified (--no-persist not honored, CleanExit exit codes, MLX checksum missing). All blockers addressed in revision 3.

Security, privacy, and keychain/CLI behavior review: blocked on --no-persist privacy bug. Addressed by wiring persist flag through RuntimeAssembly. Key-file trade-off and MLX checksum gap documented as follow-up hardening.
CLI spec compliance and UX review: blocked on --no-persist, exit codes, and MLX checksum. All addressed; spec updated to use exit code 64 for validation/usage errors.
SDL governance and documentation accuracy review: blocked on untracked repo-local lifecycle record and summary claiming review already passed. Record staged in revision 3; summary corrected.
Focused re-review after fixes: four of five blockers fixed; remaining untracked lifecycle record resolved by staging. Summary exit-code doc inconsistency corrected.
